title: Electrical Age: Re-Wired
description: A 1.12.2 port and overhaul of Electrical Age, introducing realistic power grids, voltage management, thermal mechanics, and advanced automation.
body:
# Electrical Age: Re-Wired

NOTE: Still in Alpha, may not be ready for survival gameplay! And please, backup your worlds, altough corruption is unlikely, a crash could make your world unplayable until we fix it!

_Real Physics. Real Danger. Real Engineering._

  Have you ever felt that most tech mods are too simple? That "energy" is just a magic number that flows through pipes? Electrical Age: Re-Wired is here to change that. This is the definitive 1.12.2 port and modern overhaul of the
  legendary [Electrical Age mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/electrical-age-jrddunbr-edition) (maintained 1.7.10 fork).

  In this mod, electricity isn't just a number—it follows the laws of physics. You aren't just placing blocks; you're building a living, breathing power grid.

  ---


###   🔌 A Real Power Grid
  Forget simple "Energy Units." Here you have to manage Voltage, Current, and Resistance.
   * Don't Blow It Up: If you plug a 50V lightbulb directly into an 800V high-voltage line, it won't just "not work" - it will explode.
   * Step Up & Down: Use transformers and DC-DC converters to manage power across long distances, just like a real-world city.
   * Resistive Loss: Long cables have resistance. Plan your wiring carefully to ensure power actually reaches your machines!


###   🔥 Thermal Management
  Some machines aren't just "on" or "off." They generate heat.
   * If your power plant runs without cooling, it will overheat and explode.
   * Build cooling systems using passive heat sinks or active heatsink fans to keep your plant running smoothly.


###   ☀ Harness the Elements
  Generate power using a huge variety of detailed components:
   * Solar Power: From small roof panels to massive 2x3 arrays that actually track the sun across the sky.
   * Wind & Water: Build turbines and water wheels that react to the environment.
   * Coal Heat Furnaces: Harness the power of the furnace to heat turbines, and generate power from coal and heat!
   * Industrial Turbines: Build massive steam or gas-powered generators for end-game power needs.


###   🤖 Advanced Automation & Gadgets
   * The Auto-Miner: The iconic mining rig is back! Deploy a massive drill head and watch it procedurally excavate your world.
   * Sensors & Probes: Use voltage probes, light sensors, and entity detectors to automate your base.
   * Logic Gates: A full suite of chips (AND, OR, XOR) and analog components (PID regulators) lets you build computers out of pure electricity.
   * 3D Visuals: Every component uses high-quality 3D models, giving your base a unique, industrial laboratory aesthetic.


###   🚀 Built for 1.12.2
  This isn't just a copy-paste port. We've rebuilt the core of the mod to be faster and more stable:
   * Modern Performance: Rewritten in Kotlin for better compatibility with modern modpacks.
   * CleanroomMC Ready: Optimized to run on modern Java versions (8 through 21+).
   * Classic Feel: All the original mechanics you loved, now polished and ready for your 1.12.2 world.

  ---


###   🛠 Compatibility
  We play nice with others!
   * Ore Dictionary: Works with Copper, Lead, and Tungsten from other mods.
   * OpenComputers/ComputerCraft: Hook up your grid to a computer for the ultimate automated control room.


  Ready to wire up your world? Download Electrical Age: Re-Wired today and start engineering!
